final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic poster for a reimagined "A Chinese Odyssey" (大话西游) in 1990s Hong Kong film style, featuring 至尊宝 and 紫霞 in a wall embrace, with 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the distance.

Style/medium: 1990s Hong Kong cinema poster with the saturated film-grain soul of Stephen Chow's era — celluloid warmth, analog imperfection, the texture of a well-loved VHS sleeve
Composition: mid-shot of the embracing couple centered on a crumbling ancient city wall, distant figures silhouetted against a wide dusk sky, vertical poster layout with generous sky above
Subject: 至尊宝 and 紫霞 locked in a tender kiss against the city wall in the foreground; 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing apart from each other in the far background, small against the horizon
Scene/backdrop: ancient stone city wall at golden dusk, crumbling parapets, vast open plain stretching to the horizon, heavy clouds catching the last light
Lighting/mood: the aching warmth of a last farewell — golden hour bleeding into deep amber, the kind of light that makes every moment feel borrowed and irreversible
Color palette: burnt amber and dusty rose in the foreground warmth, cooling to muted indigo and slate at the horizon, the chromatic tension between love and loss
Materials/textures: heavy 35mm film grain throughout, slight color bleed at high-contrast edges, faded emulsion warmth, the tactile memory of analog celluloid
Text (verbatim): 大话西游
Constraints: vertical poster format, film grain visible at all tonal ranges, figures clearly readable against backdrop
Avoid: digital-clean rendering, CGI sheen, modern color grading, oversaturated fantasy palette, generic wuxia poster cliché
